name: v1.7.2 - Taskbar Icon & Snippets UI Fix
body:
## What's New in v1.7.2

🐛 **Hotfixes**
- Fixed an issue where the taskbar icon was displaying the default Electron icon.
- Fixed a layout bug in the Snippets tool where adding multiple snippets would cause the container to squish and hide content.
- Added a new **Expand/Collapse** button for snippets to keep the list clean and manageable.

*(This update will automatically install over v1.7.0 or v1.7.1)*
